tool_design.role_in_intervention: Monthly conversation frame that turns one-to-ones into a consistent management habit.
tool_design.expected_output: Completed one-to-one record with themes, actions, and review date

failure_warnings.warning: The template is used once as a workshop artifact and then forgotten.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: The intervention loses its operating rhythm.
early_signals: The template is completed but never revisited
Actions or notes stay blank after rollout

failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: The output exists but does not drive action.
early_signals: No owner or due date captured

content:
# Monthly 1:1 Conversation Template **Tool ID:** T076-06 **Block:** B076 (Communication Culture & Feedback) **Domain:** Team & Talent (D04_team_talent) **Level:** L2 **Format:** Template **Role:** Manager / Owner **Time Required:** 20-30 minutes per conversation **Version:** 1.0 --- ## What This Tool Is For This tool gives managers a repeatable structure for one-to-one conversations that are not just performance reviews and not just casual chats. Use it to understand: - what is going well - what is frustrating the person - where communication is breaking down - what support they need - what should happen before the next 1:1 --- ## Before The 1:1
  • Choose a quiet, private time.
  • Review any previous notes or agreed actions.
  • Bring one positive observation and one question, not a speech.
  • Be ready to listen more than you talk.
--- ## 1:1 Record **Team member:** ____________________ **Manager:** ____________________ **Date:** ____________________ **Next review date:** ____________________ ### 1. Check-in | Prompt | Notes | |---|---| | How has the last month felt? | | | What has gone well? | | | What has been harder than it should be? | | ### 2. Communication and feedback | Prompt | Notes | |---|---| | Do you feel informed enough to do your job well? | | | Is there anything people are not saying directly enough? | | | Have you received helpful feedback recently? | | | Is there anything you have hesitated to raise? | | ### 3. Support needed | Area | Notes | |---|---| | Training | | | Confidence | | | Team relationships | | | Rota / workload | | | Manager support | | ### 4. Agreed next steps | Action | Owner | Due | |---|---|---| | | | | | | | | | | | | ### 5. Manager reflection - What theme is repeating? ______________________________________ - What should I follow up? ______________________________________ - Does anything need escalation? ______________________________________ --- ## Good Prompts To Use - "What's making work easier right now?" - "Where are you getting stuck?" - "What have I not seen clearly enough?" - "Is there anything the team is avoiding saying out loud?" - "What would make next month run better for you?" --- ## Common Mistakes - Turning the whole 1:1 into manager talk. - Only speaking when there is a problem. - Recording nothing and trusting memory. - Asking for honesty, then reacting defensively. - Leaving with no actions or no date. --- ## Connected Resources **Used alongside:** - T076-04 - Difficult Conversations Guide - T076-07 - Suggestions & Response Tracker **Parent block:** B076 - Communication Culture & Feedback --- *Tool Version 1.0 - built to create a steady rhythm of honest manager-team conversation.*
